code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_list(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut has_num = false
  mut acc = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_space(b)
      if has_num
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, 0 - acc)
        else
          result = list.push(result, acc)
        end
        has_num = false
        acc = 0
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has_num
      neg = true
      has_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not has_num
      has_num = true
    else if is_digit(b)
      acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_num
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - acc)
    else
      result = list.push(result, acc)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let items = parse_list(line1)
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  match find_index(items, target)
  when Some(i)
    println("index=#{i}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
